selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 图画, 制图, 拉
words.definition: n. an illustration that is drawn by hand and published in a book, magazine, or newspaper

words.translation: n. 图画, 照片, 景色, 美丽如画的人(或物), 化身, 生动的描述, 想像, 形象思维；vt. 画, 拍摄, 用图说明, 描写, 想像
words.definition: n. a visual representation (of an object or scene or person or abstraction) produced on a surface

words.translation: n. 画, 绘画, 油漆
words.definition: n. graphic art consisting of an artistic composition made by applying paints to a surface

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 颜色, 面色, 颜料, 外貌；vt. 把...涂上颜色, 粉饰, 使脸红, 歪曲
words.definition: n any material used for its color

words.translation: n. 盖子, 封面, 藉口；vt. 覆盖, 掩饰, 保护, 掩护, 包括
words.definition: n. the act of concealing the existence of something by obstructing the view of it

words.translation: n. 捕捉, 陷阱, 捕捉之物, 抓, 拉手；vt. 捕捉, 赶上, 感染, 听清楚
words.definition: n. a drawback or difficulty that is not readily evident

words.translation: n. 正方形, 街区, 广场, 平方, 直角尺；a. 正方形的, 正直的, 公正的, 平方的, 方正的, 结清的
words.definition: n. (geometry) a plane rectangle with four equal sides and four right angles; a four-sided regular polygon

words.translation: n. 男孩
words.definition: n. a friendly informal reference to a grown man

words.translation: n. 切口, 割伤, 降低, 切, 割, 砍, 削, 伤口, 削减, 缩短, 删节, 通路；a. 经切割的, 缩减的
words.definition: n. a share of the profits

words.translation: n. 前面, 开头, 前线, 阵线, 态度；vt. 面对, 朝向, 对抗
words.definition: n. the side that is forward or prominent

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
words.definition: v. beat for the purpose of cleaning and thickening

words.translation: n. 比赛, 玩耍, 比分, 得胜, 比赛规则, 策略, 游戏, 野味；vi. 赌博
words.definition: n. a contest with rules to determine a winner

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 希望, 信心, 期待；v. 希望, 期望, 信赖
words.definition: n. a specific instance of feeling hopeful

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: n. red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood

words.translation: n. 路, 道路, 公路, 途径, 方法
words.definition: n. an open way (generally public) for travel or transportation

words.translation: n. 秒, 瞬间, 第二名, 支持者, 助手；a. 第二的, 其次的, 次要的, 附加的, 辅助的
words.definition: n. 1/60 of a minute; the basic unit of time adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites

words.translation: n. 街道, 马路, 街区；a. 街道的
words.definition: n. a thoroughfare (usually including sidewalks) that is lined with buildings

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组
words.definition: n. a cooperative unit (especially in sports)

words.translation: n. 顶部, 顶端, 极点, 上面, 上部, 顶篷, 最高地位, 首位, 陀螺；a. 最高的, 顶上的, 头等的
words.definition: n. the upper part of anything

words.translation: n. 大纲, 轮廓, 概要；vt. 描画轮廓, 描述要点
words.definition: n. the line that appears to bound an object

words.translation: n. 收集, 采集, (一批)收藏品, 募捐
words.definition: n. several things grouped together or considered as a whole

words.translation: n. 婴孩

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: n. 马, 骑兵, 脚架；vi. 骑马, 取笑
words.definition: n. solid-hoofed herbivorous quadruped domesticated since prehistoric times

words.translation: n. 笔记, 记录, 注解, 票据, 符号, 显要, 注重, 便笺, 照会；vt. 记录, 注解, 注意
words.definition: n. a brief written record

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王

words.translation: n. 骑马, 乘坐, 乘车, 搭便车；vt. 骑, 乘坐, 压迫, 控制
words.definition: n. a mechanical device that you ride for amusement or excitement

words.translation: n. 商店, 工厂, 车间；vi. 购物, 到处寻找

words.translation: vi. 唱, 唱歌, 演唱, 鸣, 啼；vt. 唱, 歌颂

words.translation: n. 歌, 曲, 鸣声, 歌唱, 歌曲, 诗歌
words.definition: n. a short musical composition with words

words.translation: n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: 太太
words.definition: n. a form of address for a married woman

words.translation: a. 有色的, 有...色的, 经过渲染的, 有色彩的, 伪装的, 有色人种的, 混血种的；n. 有色人种的人, 混血人

words.translation: n. 王冠, 王权, 顶点；vt. 使成王, 加冕, 居...之顶

words.translation: n. 苹果, 家伙

words.translation: n. 门, 牌楼, 大门, 通道, 闸；vt. 装门于

words.translation: a. 健康的, 有益健康的, 卫生的

words.translation: n. 叶, 树叶, 花瓣, 页；vi. 生叶, 翻书页

words.translation: a. 疯狂的, 发疯的, 生气的, 愚蠢的, 狂欢的；n. 狂怒

words.translation: n. 文本, 正文, 课文, 主题, 圣经文句, 乐谱

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止

words.translation: n. 档案, 公文箱, 文件夹, 文件, 卷宗, 锉刀；vi. 列队行进, 用锉刀做

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映

words.translation: adv. 简单地, 只是, 简直, 简朴地, 坦白地

words.translation: n. 一种描述, 版本, 译文

words.translation: a. 很多的, 数目众多的, 多数的；[机] 多数的, 甚多的
